idea-plugin.name: Dingo Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Dingo Language Support

Language support for Dingo - a modern meta-language for Go that adds Result/Option types, pattern matching, error propagation, and more.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting
  • Code completion
  • Hover information with types
  • Error diagnostics
  • Go to definition
  • Find references

Requirements

  • Install dingo-lsp: go install github.com/MadAppGang/dingo/cmd/dingo-lsp@latest
  • Ensure gopls is installed

Learn more at dingolang.com
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • Rich HTML-formatted error messages in hover tooltips
  • Contextual help with code examples for common errors
  • Improved unresolved lambda type inference error messages
  • Better null coalescing and parsing error descriptions

0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Syntax highlighting via TextMate grammar
  • LSP integration for completion, hover, diagnostics
